title: Fanatic Love
overview: Song Chengyue has secretly loved his best friend Su Yi since high school, but when they reunite three years later in a virtual reality world, he’s given a second chance to finally confess his feelings and win her heart.

trailers.title: Fanatic Love | Official Trailer | Does saying ‘I love you’ ever become easier in a virtual world?
